Acrostic: IN THE HISTORY BOOKS TRULY WE SEE A PERFECT PLAN
INITIAL FALL, CALLING ABRAHAM, ISAAC TO JACOB, JOSEPH IN EGYPT
NATION ESCAPES EGYPT, GET LAW, CREATE TABERNACLE
TEACHING GOD'S LAWS TO THE PEOPLE
HISTORY OF ISRAEL'S FORTY WILDERNESS YEARS
EARNESTLY REPEATS THE LAW BEFORE CANAAN
TWO KINGS CHOSEN BY GOD: SAUL AND DAVID
YEARS OF SIN UNTIL BOTH OUSTED
OUR TEMPLE, SOLOMON'S ROYAL LINE UNTIL TAKEN
THE STORY OF A RIGHTEOUS MAN WHO LOST ALL HE EVER HAD

RESPONDING TO GOD'S GOODNESS KING DAVID WORSHIPS 
OUR GREAT KING WHO WILL REDEEM US FROM 
YEARS OF DEEP SORROW 
AND PREVAIL FOREVER. 
LET OUR PRAISES GO UP TO JERUSALEM AND BRING HIM GLORY.
WARNINGS OF JUDGMENT AND PROMISES OF A NEW KING, SUFFERING SERVANT, NEW CREATION
ENTRY TO BABYLON PROPHESIED AND A NEW COVENANT OF FORGIVENESS
END OF JUDAH PROPHESIED AND THEN A NEW TEMPLE IN JERUSALEM
JESUS GAVE US NEW LIFE ETERNALLY
JESUS THE ANOINTED KING OF ISRAEL
LOOK OUT FOR THESE UNGODLY MEN
